text.title: github-projects Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for github-projects as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent fetches project_id and field_ids at the start of every operation without caching.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each GraphQL query consumes 50-100 of the 5000 points/hour rate limit. Caching IDs reduces overhead to zero for subsequent sessions.
